name: Karavira (Oleander)
usesInAyurveda: Tridoshic Modulation: Pacifies Kapha and Vata.
mainMedicinalUses: Used topically for stubborn skin infections and leprosy.
Effective for hair loss related to scalp issues.
Assists in cardiac conditions in minute, expert doses.
plantProfile: All parts of the plant are severely toxic.
preparationMethods: Processed into oils for external use.
safetyProfile: EXTREMELY TOXIC. Fatal if ingested in small amounts.
